message: Hello B1, my cost is 18. What's your valuation? Let's agree on a fair midpoint price for consistent trades over 20 rounds to maximize our payoffs.
I'll bid 19 every round if you ask 19. That gives you profit and me a large surplus. Agreed?
Thanks for round 1 trade. My cost is 18, so 19 gives slim profit. To fairly split, reveal your valuation? Let's agree on midpoint, say bid/ask 40 for steady profits over 20 rounds.
I'll bid 19 every round if you ask 19. That gives you profit (cost 18) and me big surplus. If you raise your ask I'll bid 0 instead. Agree to repeated 19/19 trades?
B1, 19 is slim for me long-term. Let's agree on 30/30 for fairer split and steady profits over remaining rounds. If not, I'll ask 25 this round—better than 0 for both.
I'll bid 19 every round if you ask 19. Ask >19 and I'll bid 0. 19/19 maximizes my payoff - agree?
